---
title: "Facebook"
platform_slug: "facebook"
sources:
  ugc:
    BR: data/global/facebook/ugc.yml
    EU: data/global/facebook/ugc.yml
    UK: data/global/facebook/ugc.yml
  ads:
    BR: data/regional/BR/meta/ads.yml
    EU: data/regional/EU/meta/ads.yml
    UK: data/regional/UK/meta/ads.yml
---

Although Meta offers [Meta Content Library API](https://web.archive.org/web/20251010131827/https://developers.facebook.com/docs/content-library-and-api),
    extracting data is not allowed and violates the terms of usage. You can produce
    analysis and only the result of this analysis can be downloaded. See the [API
    overview](https://web.archive.org/web/20251010132741/https://developers.facebook.com/docs/content-library-and-api/content-library-api/overview)
    for details

[@Cotter2021]

https://www.facebook.com/ads/library

## Transparency Assessment


```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

```{python}
#| label: platform-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from utils.platform_summary import generate_platform_summary
generate_platform_summary("facebook")
```

## Detailed Assessment


## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="facebook",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="facebook",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
